artifact_summary: This document is a process schematic for a dewatering facility, detailing the instrumentation and control logic for centrifuges and pumps.
artifact_blurb: This process schematic illustrates the instrumentation and control layout for a dewatering system, connecting the central PLC to field panels and process equipment. It details the specific instrumentation for centrifuges and booster pumps, including sensors, valves, and drive controls. The diagram serves as a reference for the automated control logic and physical connections within the wastewater treatment facility.
